title: Eco-driving for Electric Connected Vehicles at Signalized Intersections: A Parameterized Reinforcement Learning Approach
authors: Xia Jiang; Jian Zhang; Dan Li
venue: Journal article related DOI / arXiv version
method_family: Parameterized reinforcement learning / 参数化强化学习

section_headings.heading: 4.1. Reinforcement Learning in Hybrid Action Space

concepts: 把信号控制替换为车辆级调度与控制。
减少急加减速、停车和能耗峰值。
把碰撞风险写成距离、时间间隔或屏障函数。

textbook_study_path: 第一遍先读首页截图、摘要与引言，确认研究问题和场景假设。
第二遍沿着技术路线图复现模型变量、约束和求解器输入输出。
第三遍逐节阅读 section deep reading，对照 PDF 截图检查公式、图表和实验。
第四遍只站在审稿人视角重读实验，判断 baseline、公平性、消融和鲁棒性。
最后把博士 checklist 写成自己的复现实验或论文拓展计划。

section_deep_reading.heading: 1. Introduction
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 建立研究动机：为什么传统信号控制、FCFS 或单车控制不足以处理该论文关注的交叉口协同问题。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Understand why the paper needs a new coordination method rather than a standard signal, FCFS, or single-vehicle controller.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 这一部分通常把痛点落到 Electric CV eco-driving + parameterized RL：既要提高效率，又要保持安全与在线可执行。
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 精读时标出作者批判的 baseline、场景假设、交通参与者类型和隐含优化目标。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 作者指出的痛点是否真的需要新方法，还是可以由更强的优化器/更保守规则解决？

section_deep_reading.heading: 2. Background of Reinforcement Learning
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 建立方法谱系和相关工作边界，避免把本文贡献误读为完全从零开始。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Place the paper inside the broader method taxonomy.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 该部分说明作者站在哪些已有工作之上，以及本文选择绕开或继承了哪些限制。
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 把相关工作按 scheduler、smoother、safety filter、evaluation 四类重排。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 作者是否公平比较了最接近的强 baseline？

section_deep_reading.heading: 3. Methodology
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 解释算法如何把模型转化为可执行决策，并说明在线运行机制。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Trace how the paper turns the model into executable online decisions.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 参数化 RL 把驾驶行为拆成离散模式和对应连续参数，结合模型式跟驰/变道规则处理周围 HDV，再用学习策略选择节能动作。该结构很适合未来把高层调度选择和低层连续轨迹合并。
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 画出输入、核心求解器、输出和安全检查接口，明确哪些步骤是优化、哪些是规则、哪些是学习。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 若算法某一步失败，论文有没有 fallback、重规划或安全过滤机制？

section_deep_reading.heading: 3.1. Scenario description
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 承接前后章节，补充局部定义、案例或实现细节。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Recover implementation details needed for reproduction.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 这类章节常常不是主贡献，但决定你能否真正复现方法。
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 检查它是否给出了参数、伪代码、场景划分或实现细节。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 跳过该节会不会导致公式或实验无法复现？

paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 先把作者的痛点翻译成一句博士问题：如何同时处理离散驾驶决策和连续控制参数，使电动网联车在信号交叉口实现节能通行？ 读这一段时不要急着接受动机，要追问传统 FCFS、信号灯或保守 MPC 为什么不足。
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Turn the opening motivation into one doctoral-level question and test whether the paper truly needs a new method.

paragraph_walkthrough.stage: Assumption and setting / 假设与场景段
paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 把车辆类型、通信条件、路口类型和动力学假设列成表。该文的关键边界包括：周围车辆行为可由跟驰/变道模型近似。；电动车能耗模型可靠，且可用于仿真奖励。；信号灯信息和车辆状态可观测。
paragraph_walkthrough.en: List vehicle type, communication, intersection setting, and dynamics assumptions before reading the equations.

paragraph_walkthrough.stage: Model and notation / 模型与符号段
paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 围绕核心公式“参数化动作 MDP / Parameterized-action MDP”复写符号表，确认每个变量是决策变量、状态变量、参数还是约束阈值。
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Rewrite the symbol table around the core formulation and classify variables as states, decisions, parameters, or constraints.

paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 把算法读成一条数据流：输入交通状态，执行 Parameterized RL combines model-based car-following, lane-changing policy, and learned longitudinal/lateral decisions.，输出可执行通行/控制决策，并检查安全接口。
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Read the algorithm as a dataflow from traffic state to executable sequence/control decision, with explicit safety interfaces.

paragraph_walkthrough.stage: Experiment and evidence / 实验证据段
paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 不要只看作者报告的提升，要检查基准、公平性和指标。本文验证描述为：SUMO evaluation from single-vehicle and flow perspectives.
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Go beyond reported gains and inspect baselines, fairness, metrics, and computation time.

paragraph_walkthrough.stage: Reviewer synthesis / 审稿式总结段
paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 最后把贡献拆成可发表与需补强两部分。对你课题最直接的用途是：Provides a SUMO-compatible example of energy and stop reduction metrics for the experimental section.
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Separate publishable contribution from missing evidence, then connect the result to your own thesis architecture.

technical_route.content: 车辆状态、路径/车道、交通需求、信号或协同信息。

Learns energy-saving actions around signalized intersections without interrupting surrounding HDVs.
SUMO evaluation from single-vehicle and flow perspectives.

doctoral_checklist: 能否独立重写核心公式：参数化动作 MDP / Parameterized-action MDP，并解释每个符号的物理意义？
能否画出输入-模型-算法-控制-验证的数据流图？
能否指出至少两个强假设，并说明它们在真实交通中何时失效？
能否复述实验基准是否公平，指标是否覆盖效率、安全、能耗和计算时间？
能否提出一个与自己 JSSP/RL/smoother 课题直接相连的拓展实验？

overview.background_zh: 这篇论文位于“Electric CV eco-driving + parameterized RL”方向。对你的 JSSP-based Intersection Management 课题，它回答的是高层调度、低层轨迹平滑、安全过滤或真实验证中的一个关键子问题：如何让车辆在路口少停、少冲突、少能耗，同时保持在线可执行。
overview.background_en: The paper belongs to the theme of Electric CV eco-driving + parameterized RL. For a JSSP-based intersection-management thesis, it illuminates one of the key layers: scheduling, smoothing, safety filtering, or real-world validation.
overview.pain_zh: Signalized intersections and electric connected vehicles rather than fully signal-free autonomous scheduling.
overview.pain_en: The main pain point is that efficient intersection coordination must handle combinatorial interactions, continuous vehicle dynamics, and safety constraints under online computation limits.
overview.core_question_zh: 如何同时处理离散驾驶决策和连续控制参数，使电动网联车在信号交叉口实现节能通行？
overview.core_question_en: How can discrete maneuver choices and continuous control parameters be learned jointly for EV eco-driving at signalized intersections?
contributions: 方法贡献 (method contribution)：Parameterized RL combines model-based car-following, lane-changing policy, and learned longitudinal/lateral decisions.
安全/避碰贡献 (safety contribution)：Safety is handled through model-based car-following and lane-changing constraints around human-driven vehicles.
平滑/停止避免贡献 (smoothing contribution)：Learns energy-saving actions around signalized intersections without interrupting surrounding HDVs.
创新力度评判 (reviewer judgement)：中等偏强：参数化动作空间贴合驾驶决策结构，对混合离散-连续调度有启发。

methodology.model_name: 参数化动作 MDP / Parameterized-action MDP
symbols: 如目标速度或加速度幅值
评价离散-连续组合收益
累积能耗、效率和安全目标
methodology.algorithm_zh: 参数化 RL 把驾驶行为拆成离散模式和对应连续参数，结合模型式跟驰/变道规则处理周围 HDV，再用学习策略选择节能动作。该结构很适合未来把高层调度选择和低层连续轨迹合并。
methodology.algorithm_en: Parameterized RL separates maneuver selection from continuous parameter control, combining learned decisions with model-based car-following and lane-changing constraints.
methodology.stability_zh: 模型式规则给安全留出底线，学习器主要优化效率和能耗；但混合动作空间训练难度较高，参数边界设计会影响收敛。
methodology.stability_en: Model-based constraints provide a safety floor, while the learner optimizes energy and efficiency; convergence depends strongly on action parameterization.
assumptions: 周围车辆行为可由跟驰/变道模型近似。
电动车能耗模型可靠，且可用于仿真奖励。
信号灯信息和车辆状态可观测。

experiments.validation: SUMO evaluation from single-vehicle and flow perspectives.
experiments.baselines: 传统生态驾驶、普通 DQN/DDPG、规则驾驶、无参数化 RL 和 IDM。
experiments.metrics: 电耗、平均速度、延误、停车次数、舒适性和混合交通影响。
experiments.ablation: 应比较参数化 RL 与纯离散、纯连续动作策略；还应测试参数边界和模型式安全规则的贡献。

figure_table_cues.reading: 先确认输入、决策层、控制层和安全约束之间的数据流。
检查状态、动作、奖励、经验回放和安全惩罚是否闭环一致。
重点看平均值之外的密度变化、失败场景、计算时间和方差。

experiments.reviewer_reading: 阅读实验时不要只看平均值；应检查交通密度、车流方向、随机种子、失败案例和计算耗时。For doctoral reading, inspect density regimes, demand patterns, random seeds, failure cases, and computation time rather than only mean improvements.

limitations: 信号交叉口和电动车设定使结论不完全适用于无信号 CAV 调度。
参数化动作设计依赖专家经验。
混合交通中 HDV 模型错误可能传播到策略学习。
extensions: 把 JSSP 的车辆排序作为离散动作，把目标时间/速度作为连续参数。
加入不确定 HDV 模型集合，做鲁棒参数化 RL。
用分层策略把 lane choice、arrival time 和 speed profile 分别建模。
critique.project_use: Provides a SUMO-compatible example of energy and stop reduction metrics for the experimental section.

interactive.response_zh: 渗透率提高通常增强节能协同，但低渗透率下收益受 HDV 约束明显。
interactive.response_en: Higher penetration improves eco-coordination, while low penetration is constrained by HDVs.

html_structure: 顶部固定 metadata bar：题名、作者、年份、主题、PDF 页数。
左侧目录/section navigator，右侧为五大精读模块。
公式卡片使用 <pre> 或 LaTeX block，紧跟符号表。
审稿人批注用 reviewer-note block，博士拓展用 research-idea list。
交互参数用 input[type=range] + canvas 曲线，打印 PDF 时隐藏交互控件但保留解释。
